code: import React from'react';import'./Pagination.css';import{Button}from'./Button';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export const Pagination=_ref=>{let{currentPage,totalPages,onPageChange}=_ref;if(totalPages<=1)return null;const pages=[];for(let i=0;i<totalPages;i++){pages.push(i);}return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"pagination",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Button,{variant:"secondary",size:"small",disabled:currentPage===0,onClick:()=>onPageChange(currentPage-1),children:"Previous"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"pagination-pages",children:pages.map(page=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:`page-button ${currentPage===page?'active':''}`,onClick:()=>onPageChange(page),children:page+1},page))}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Button,{variant:"secondary",size:"small",disabled:currentPage===totalPages-1,onClick:()=>onPageChange(currentPage+1),children:"Next"})]});};export default Pagination;
